title: Run final cross-language quality gates
description: Run final Python suite, Rust tests/clippy, Zephyr native_sim/Twister tests, and three independent reviews for the new Rust, Zephyr, Renode, and fleet-runner changes.
acceptance_criteria: From clean local main plus committed recovery slices, run locked Python tests/Ruff/mypy, Rust fmt/tests/all-feature clippy, host C tests/sanitizers, full Zephyr Twister matrix on the EBS builder, production board builds, canonical vector regeneration, and three independent final reviews; zero unexpected skips, ignored failures, stale generated files, or dirty validation worktrees; record hashes/logs and do not push without explicit authorization.
